text: The gnomes are hard at work. Between promo materials, artwork, and final line edits, the book release is later than expected. Full launch on July 10th 💪
Print manuscript is now being formatted. *No Snooze Button for the Wicked* is scheduled to release in 2 weeks - stay tuned!
Thank you to all my beta readers, this couldn't have happened without your help. ARC copies are being formatted.
Just added a new Car gallery section. Check out some vintage photographs from my collection!
Website is now live! Welcome to the official website for Agency Grimm.
